calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing (as to Defendant Heristal Castro) this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, Bailiff: R. Guitron.
Alan Horwitz, Esq. for Plaintiff: Archstone Communities.
Plaintiff's Witness: Ian Hakenson was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony, reviewing and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Heristal Castro and pursuant to the Stipulation for Entry of Judgment as to Co-Defendant Tim Marentic as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 1390 Market St., APT. #2326, San Francisco.

Money damages against Co-Defendant: Tim Marentic only as follows:
Damages $4,982.87
Costs $335.00, for a total of $5,317.87
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-21-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ian Hakenson, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Archstone Communities
Alan Horwitz, Esq. for plaintiff

Tim Marentic, defendant
Kenneth Greenstein, Esq. by limited scope representation for defendant

Settlement conference is held. Case settled. Trial date vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Deborah Schweizer, Clerk Linda Fong, not reported (218)
